title: RFM 2026
text:
I recommend the Ibis hotel “Rotterdam City Centre”, which is located centrally next to the Market hall and the famous Cube Houses houses. The hotel is also within walking distance of many restaurants and bars in the city center.
If you want to stay close to the campus, you might consider Novotel Rotterdam Brainpark.

title: RFM 2026
text:
Travel Information

To Rotterdam
Rotterdam is well-connected by train to major cities in the Netherlands and neighbouring countries as well as to the airport Amsterdam Schiphol. The main train station is Rotterdam Central Station located in the city center. Trains run frequently, and you can check the schedule on the NS website.
by Car: Parking in Rotterdam can be expensive and limited, especially in the city center. If you are driving, consider parking at a Park & Ride (P+R) facility and take a tram/metro to the city center.


Within Rotterdam
From Rotterdam city center to the campus, you can take either tram line 11 (direction De Esch) to the station Woudestein or tram line 7 (direction Woudestein) to station Erasmus Universiteit. Travel information can be found on the RET website.
Note: In the Netherlands, there are no ticket machines at the tram stops or in buses but you can easily pay with a contactless debit or credit card when boarding the tram (called OVPay). Just tap your card on the card reader when you get on the bus/tram/metro. Importantly, when you exit you have to tap your card again (check out) to calculate the fare based on the distance travelled. You can also buy tickets at some few stations, but this is more expensive and not recommended

title: Response Force Meeting 2026
text:
Workshop on response force measurements for psychological research

September 7th & 8th 2026  Erasmus University Rotterdam



The meeting aims to bring together researchers from disciplines to discuss the latest developments in response force measurements and to foster future collaboration. I’m looking forward to welcoming you to Rotterdam in September 2026. Oliver Lindemann

title: RFM 2026
text:
The workshop takes place on the Woudestein campus of the Erasmus University Rotterdam.
Building: Mandeville (campus map)  Room: T13-67 (13th floor)


Department of Psychology, Education and Child Studies Erasmus University Rotterdam Burgemeester Oudlaan 50 3062 PA Rotterdam
